notes: Spain start without injured Fermín López (fractured metatarsal, tournament miss) and begin Lamine Yamal & Nico Williams on the bench after hamstring recoveries, with Víctor Muñoz also a late doubt (muscular overload); De la Fuente opted to rotate the wingers in as impact subs. Cape Verde have no reported injuries or suspensions and field a full squad.
home_scorers: Mikel Oyarzabal (first-choice striker, leads the line from kick-off)
Ferran Torres (starting winger, direct goal threat in attack)
Pedri (central creator, late-run goalscorer and set-piece contributor)
away_scorers: Ryan Mendes (experienced winger, Cape Verde's primary attacking outlet)
Garry Rodrigues (forward/wide, top scorer in qualification)
Jamiro Monteiro (attacking midfielder, set-piece and long-range threat)
